title: Phlebotomy Technician
description: AbbVie is hiring a Phlebotomy Technician to collect blood specimens from trial participants at our Cambridge research facility. You will perform venipunctures, handle specimens according to protocol, maintain patient comfort, and ensure specimens are properly processed and labeled for analysis.
responsibilities: Perform venipuncture and collect blood specimens from research participants
Prepare, label, and process blood samples per protocol specifications
Maintain equipment and ensure proper calibration of centrifuges
Track specimen chain of custody and maintain documentation
Monitor participant comfort and address concerns
Adhere to OSHA bloodborne pathogen standards and safety protocols

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; phlebotomy certificate or program completion required
certifications: CPT (Certified Phlebotomy Technician) required or obtainable

benefits: Health insurance and employee wellness programs
